summary_en: Annual dividend raised to ¥57/share (from ¥50 prior forecast) for FY2026/3. Year-end dividend increased ¥7 to ¥42/share. Payout ratio target 15% per Rolling Vision 2025 mid-term plan. Increase driven by consolidated earnings exceeding prior guidance.
title_en: Notice regarding revision to FY2026/3 year-end dividend forecast (dividend increase)
translation_en_brief: Mitsui E&S announced on 14 May 2026 a revision to its FY2026/3 dividend forecast. The annual dividend per share has been increased from the previously announced ¥50 to ¥57, with the year-end dividend portion raised from ¥35 to ¥42 per share. The revision reflects consolidated earnings results that exceeded prior guidance. The new payout level aligns with the company's medium-term target payout ratio of 15% as stated in Rolling Vision 2025. Management noted that the dividend policy balances shareholder returns with capital investment for business growth, R&D, and strengthening of equity capital, while remaining mindful of cost of equity and debt cost.
